case_title: VALERIE TRACEY BROWN-TATE VS. THE DAZZLING BEAUTY GROUP INC., A DELAWARE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN-TATE, VALERIE TRACEY AS TO DEFENDANT THE DAZZLING BEAUTY GROUP INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA THE BEAUTY CRUSH JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
